title: Perfect Stix Wooden Makeup Spatulas ( Pack of 100)
description:
Perfect for testing makeups
High Quality Cosmetic Stick
2.5" Length

reviews_5s: Perfect one time use for any kind of product.They do the trick. I use to apply neck cream nightly. Excellent value for the price. I'm pleased.This is my second time buying these sticks. I used them to get my skincare products that don’t have a pump to keep everything clean. Simple, but effective.I’ve used spatulas for my beauty biz for years, I love that these are wooden instead of plastic and won’t sit in a landfill for years and years!These were needed to apply a gel medication to my face. They work like a charm.Superb wooden Makeup Spatula, very easy to use. I really loved using it. I strongly recommend you to buy this high-quality cosmetic spatula for a quick makeup testing.Pequeños y muy prácticoPerfect for sampling salves and creams at markets.NaInexpensive and great for not getting my creams in jars gross.
